Class JasperTemplateDesign

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.templatedesign.JasperTemplateDesign
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRITemplateDesign<net.sf.jasperreports.engine.design.JasperDesign>, Serializable
public class JasperTemplateDesign extends Object implements DRITemplateDesign<net.sf.jasperreports.engine.design.JasperDesign>

JasperTemplateDesign class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
